turns.user: how to check cron job in CLI ?
turns.assistant:
Check crontab entries:
```bash
crontab -l
```

Check if cron daemon is running:
```bash
systemctl status crond
```

Check cron logs (recent executions):
```bash
grep CRON /var/log/syslog
# or on RHEL/CentOS:
grep CRON /var/log/cron
```

For your monitor specifically, check its own log:
```bash
tail -f ~/private/homefile/nct-hubbard/benchmarks/logs/monitor.log
```
